title: aster ehrenbergii
intro: Aster ehrenbergii, also known as the Silver Daisy or Aster ehrenbergii, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aster ehrenbergii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Aster ehrenbergii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine in various parts of the world.
